/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -Xclang -fopenmp -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/TETHYS_2D.dir/src/TETHYS_2D_Main_v261.cpp.o -o TETHYS_2D  ../lib/libtethys_library.a /usr/local/Cellar/hdf5/1.12.1/lib/libhdf5_cpp.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/hdf5/1.12.1/lib/libhdf5.dylib /usr/local/opt/szip/lib/libsz.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.1.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.1.sdk/usr/lib/libdl.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.1.sdk/usr/lib/libm.tbd
